description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to any branch and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow should have a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs and runs a test job with a 30-minute timeout. The job should use a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions on Ubuntu 22.04, setting up a service with multiple databases. The job should install OS packages, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies, log versions, prepare databases, run tests and linters via Tox, and process code coverage.
